history.title: Facebook group-message sending fix published
history.summary: Version 2.0.6 includes a fix for messages in some Facebook group chats that could remain stuck in Sending.

history.title: Facebook group-message sending report acknowledged

history.title: Live status is not yet available in the extension popup
history.summary: Some users may not see live status in the extension popup yet. We’re rolling out an update and will share another update when it’s available.

history.title: Supported controls passed today's review
history.summary: Checked the supported Instagram, Messenger, and Facebook controls on v2.0.4. Every control included in today's review passed.

history.title: Instagram Hide Story Views reports received
